title: Wynncraft Pack
description: Wynncraft modpack focused around utility and immersion
body:
# About

Wynncraft Pack aims to make a more immersive experience whilst playing wynncraft, but still offers the same utility as other packs. The mod list is greatly inspired by Wynntils official mod installer. Iris is included alongside Complementary Reimagined shaders. Along with bobby, this combo alone makes for great immersion and combined with the rest of the mods, the experience is second to none. I recommend checking out the mod list on the latest version to see all the amazing mods included

## Credits

[Fresh Animations Resource Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations)
